message:
test(core): comprehensive error module test suite (20 tests, was 1)

Adds 19 tests covering: Remediation builder API chain, render_plain
output for each section (summary, commands, platform hints, alternatives,
learn_more), section omission when empty, RemediationCommand + Remediation
serde roundtrips, Error Display impls for all sub-error types, From
conversions (WeztermError, StorageError, io::Error), and sub-error
remediation content verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
